description: User scrolls through the list of opportunities on the Explore page, browsing various cards like 'Video Call', 'In Person', and 'Diary Study'.
frame_description: The Explore page is visible, showing a list of research opportunities with different colors and icons.

description: User clicks on the filter icon located in the top right corner of the Explore page.
frame_description: The cursor moves to and clicks the filter icon in the header of the Explore page.

description: The 'Filter Opportunities' modal appears, sliding up to cover the screen.
frame_description: A white modal overlay titled 'Filter Opportunities' appears over the main content.

description: User scrolls through the various filter options within the modal, including Task Type, Duration, Pay Rate, and Device.
frame_description: The user is browsing through the filter settings without making any selections.

description: User clicks the 'X' button in the top right of the filter modal to close it.
frame_description: The cursor clicks the close icon on the filter modal.

description: The filter modal closes, returning the user to the Explore opportunity list.
frame_description: The filter modal disappears, revealing the main Explore page again.

description: User continues to scroll through the opportunity list on the Explore page.
frame_description: The user is browsing the main list of opportunities again.

description: The screen transitions to a task completion message.
frame_description: A dark screen with white text appears, thanking the user and instructing them to close the task.

description: The video transitions from the app interface to a full-screen view of the participant's webcam.
frame_description: The participant, Georgie, is visible on camera, speaking to the researcher at the end of the session.
